expectations.text: CoSecConfigurer is used with proper configuration
expectations.evidence: Implementation uses CoSecConfigurer with appId, tokenStorage, deviceIdStorage, and tokenRefresher

expectations.text: TokenRefresher is properly configured with refresh function
expectations.evidence: tokenRefresher object has refresh method that exchanges refreshToken for new accessToken/refreshToken

expectations.text: JwtTokenManager or TokenStorage is configured for token persistence
expectations.evidence: TokenStorage is instantiated and passed to CoSecConfigurer for JWT token persistence in localStorage

expectations.text: SpaceIdProvider is configured for multi-tenant support
expectations.evidence: DefaultSpaceIdProvider is configured with spacedResourcePredicate and spaceIdStorage

expectations.text: Headers (CoSec-App-Id, CoSec-Device-Id, Authorization) are added to requests
expectations.evidence: CoSecConfigurer.applyTo(fetcher) adds all CoSec headers via CoSecRequestInterceptor and AuthorizationRequestInterceptor

expectations.text: CoSecRequestInterceptor is added to fetcher
expectations.evidence: CoSecConfigurer.applyTo(fetcher) adds CoSecRequestInterceptor which adds CoSec headers

expectations.text: AuthorizationRequestInterceptor adds Bearer token to requests
expectations.evidence: AuthorizationRequestInterceptor with tokenManager is explicitly added to fetcher.interceptors.request

expectations.text: AuthorizationResponseInterceptor handles 401 and retries with new token
expectations.evidence: AuthorizationResponseInterceptor with tokenManager is added to handle 401 responses

expectations.text: Interceptor chain handles token refresh flow correctly
expectations.evidence: Token refresh flow is handled by JwtTokenManager with TokenRefresher

expectations.text: Proper error handling for refresh failures
expectations.evidence: onUnauthorized callback handles session expiration and redirects to login

expectations.text: SpaceIdProvider is configured to resolve space ID from requests
expectations.evidence: SpaceIdProvider with resolveSpaceId function is configured and returns spaceId

expectations.text: Separate token storage per tenant/space is implemented
expectations.evidence: SpaceTokenStorageFactory creates and manages separate TokenStorage per spaceId

expectations.text: CoSec-Space-Id header is properly set on requests
expectations.evidence: CoSecConfigurer with spaceIdProvider handles CoSec-Space-Id header via CoSecRequestInterceptor

expectations.text: Multi-tenant fetcher registry or factory pattern is used
expectations.evidence: MultiSpaceFetcherRegistry class manages separate Fetcher instances per space

expectations.text: Per-space token management handles signIn/signOut
expectations.evidence: signIn() and signOut() methods manage tokens for each space independently

expectations.text: CoSecConfigurer is used with proper configuration
expectations.evidence: Implementation does not use CoSecConfigurer - uses manual interceptor approach instead

expectations.text: TokenRefresher is properly configured with refresh function
expectations.evidence: refreshToken function is defined and used for manual token refresh

expectations.text: JwtTokenManager or TokenStorage is configured for token persistence
expectations.evidence: Uses basic object storage instead of TokenStorage from @ahoo-wang/fetcher-cosec

expectations.text: SpaceIdProvider is configured for multi-tenant support
expectations.evidence: No SpaceIdProvider configuration present in baseline implementation

expectations.text: Headers (CoSec-App-Id, CoSec-Device-Id, Authorization) are added to requests
expectations.evidence: Only Authorization header is added; CoSec headers (CoSec-App-Id, CoSec-Device-Id) are missing

notes: No automatic 401 handling or retry mechanism

expectations.text: CoSecRequestInterceptor is added to fetcher
expectations.evidence: No CoSecRequestInterceptor used - manual auth interceptor instead

expectations.text: AuthorizationRequestInterceptor adds Bearer token to requests
expectations.evidence: Manual authInterceptor adds Authorization header with Bearer token

expectations.text: AuthorizationResponseInterceptor handles 401 and retries with new token
expectations.evidence: responseInterceptor has basic 401 handling but no automatic retry with new token

expectations.text: Interceptor chain handles token refresh flow correctly
expectations.evidence: Manual token refresh has no retry mechanism and doesn't integrate with interceptor chain

expectations.text: Proper error handling for refresh failures
expectations.evidence: No proper error handling for refresh failures - just logs error

notes: No automatic retry with new token - just logs

expectations.text: SpaceIdProvider is configured to resolve space ID from requests
expectations.evidence: No SpaceIdProvider interface used - manual X-Space-Id header instead

expectations.text: Separate token storage per tenant/space is implemented
expectations.evidence: tokenStorages Map stores separate TokenData per spaceId

expectations.text: CoSec-Space-Id header is properly set on requests
expectations.evidence: Uses custom X-Space-Id header instead of CoSec-Space-Id header

expectations.text: Multi-tenant fetcher registry or factory pattern is used
expectations.evidence: SpaceAwareFetcherFactory creates and caches separate Fetcher per space

expectations.text: Per-space token management handles signIn/signOut
expectations.evidence: setToken/clearToken functions manage tokens per space

notes: Manual X-Space-Id header instead of CoSec-Space-Id
